shorts.title_distilled: Army Under Secretary Tours Scranton Army Ammunition Plant.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, Pa. — The Under Secretary of the Army, Honorable Michael Obadal, visited the Scranton Army Ammunition Plant on March 19. SCAAP is a government-owned, contractor-operated facility, and is one of 17 arsenals, depots, and ammunition plants that are sub…

shorts.title: Charges filed after over 10k tires piled illegally
shorts.title_distilled: Charges filed after over 10k tires piled illegally.
shorts.description: CARBONDALE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — More than 10,000 tires were piled illegally on a Carbondale property, and on Tuesday, the man accused of putting them there is facing charges. The State Attorney General charged Joseph Brennan of Fell Township with five counts of unlawful conduct on Tuesday. Investigators say he ran an unregistered tire business [...]
shorts.content: CARBONDALE, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — More than 10,000 tires were piled illegally on a Carbondale property, and on Tuesday, the man accused of putting them there is facing charges. The State Attorney General charged Joseph Brennan of Fell Township with five counts of unlawful conduct on Tuesday. Investigators say he ran an unregistered tire business [...]

shorts.title: Water boil advisory lifted for nearly 600 customers
shorts.title_distilled: Water boil advisory lifted for nearly 600 customers.
shorts.description: LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Good news for nearly 600 homes and businesses in Lackawanna County: Pennsylvania American Water has lifted the water boil advisory for parts of Clarks Green and South Abington Township. Water samples collected on Sunday and Monday came back clean. The state Department of Environmental Protection gave the all-clear on Tuesday, and [...]
shorts.content: LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Good news for nearly 600 homes and businesses in Lackawanna County: Pennsylvania American Water has lifted the water boil advisory for parts of Clarks Green and South Abington Township. Water samples collected on Sunday and Monday came back clean. The state Department of Environmental Protection gave the all-clear on Tuesday, and [...]

shorts.title: Students go green for Earth Day hands-on showcase
shorts.title_distilled: Students go green for Earth Day hands-on showcase.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — It was a campus celebration with a purpose on Tuesday at the University of Scranton: Students turned the Loyola Science Center into a hands-on Earth Day showcase, hosting a fair focused on sustainability and everyday environmental action. Under the theme "Students for Sustainable Living," guests moved from table to table, [...]
shorts.content: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — It was a campus celebration with a purpose on Tuesday at the University of Scranton: Students turned the Loyola Science Center into a hands-on Earth Day showcase, hosting a fair focused on sustainability and everyday environmental action. Under the theme "Students for Sustainable Living," guests moved from table to table, [...]

shorts.title: Prom Dress Drive helps students with that special night
shorts.title_distilled: Prom Dress Drive helps students with that special night.
shorts.description: CLIFTON TOWNSHIP, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — For many, the key to prom season is finding that perfect dress to wear on their special night. "To have a great dress is to look good; it means that you think you're pretty and you're just confident overall," says North Pocono High School student Nadia Londo. Salon Joy [...]
